requirement: Buyer can create a sourcing event for RFIs, RFQs, RFPs, and auctions.
Supplier can participate in sourcing events via email and the Coupa Supplier Portal.
Sourcing events can be configured with timelines, evaluations, scoring, and award decisions.
Approval workflows are aligned with Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA) for sourcing events.
Savings tracking is available for planned, negotiated, and cost avoidance savings.
System settings and administrative configurations are relevant for sourcing activities.
Roles and responsibilities are clear for sourcing activities across business, procurement, and suppliers.
System configuration, testing, and user adoption are supported by clear functional requirements.
A controlled and scalable sourcing framework supports both strategic and operational needs.
Category Managers/Procurement team can initiate and manage strategic sourcing activities for centre-managed commodities and services.
Procurement Admins (Buyers) can initiate and manage operational sourcing activities in Coupa.
Users can conduct RFx (RFI, RFP, RFQ) events in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can conduct auctions (English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, Japanese reverse auction) in Coupa sourcing module.
Users can leverage English reverse auction, Dutch reverse auction, and Japanese reverse auction formats in Coupa.
Users can configure sourcing settings and enable controls at the Procurement Admin (Buyer) side in Coupa.
